---
name: 📋 Team Task Tracker
about: Use this template to assign, estimate, and track work for team members.
title: "[TASK]: "
labels: ["to do"]
assignees: ""
---

## 🎯 Objective

<!-- Give a clear, one-sentence description of what you are building or fixing, and why it matters. -->

_Example: Add a "Forgot Password" link to the login page so users can recover accounts._

---

## 📝 Sub-Tasks & Checklist

<!-- Break the work down into smaller, bite-sized steps. Estimate points or hours if needed. -->

- [ ] Create the UI link on the login screen
- [ ] Build the backend password-reset API endpoint
- [ ] Integrate email service to send the reset token
- [ ] Write basic unit tests for the token expiration

---

## 🔗 Links & Dependencies

- **Blockers:** None (or _Waiting on design team for assets_)
- **Related Issues/PRs:** (e.g., Connects to #12)

---

## 📅 Timeline & Estimation

- **Story Points / Estimate:** 2 Points <!-- Scale: 1 = Easy (< half day), 2 = Medium (1 day), 3 = High/Complex (1-2 days) -->
- **Target Completion Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
